## Testing

- [ ] Local testing recommended (`npm run dev`) — visual/routing/SSR changes
- [ ] Local testing not needed — content-only or trivial change
- [ ] Checked in browser locally
- [ ] Verified routes return 200 (no broken links)
- [ ] Verified images load
